hero_subtitle: From burst pipes to full renovations, we handle every plumbing need with speed and expertise.
service_area_description: Serving Chicago, Evanston, Oak Park, Skokie & surrounding areas.
services_subtitle: Comprehensive plumbing solutions for residential and commercial properties.
reviews_subtitle: Trusted by homeowners and businesses across the Chicago area.
cta_subtitle: Call for immediate service or book an appointment. We're available 24/7.
footer_description: Licensed and insured plumbing contractors serving Chicago since 2012. Emergency service available.

services_featured.name: Emergency Repairs
services_featured.description: 24/7 rapid response for burst pipes, leaks, and flooding. Get help within an hour.

services_secondary.name: Drain Cleaning
services_secondary.description: Hydro-jetting and drain rodding to clear clogs and restore flow.

services_accent.name: Water Heater Service
services_accent.description: Emergency repairs and same-day replacements for gas and electric water heaters.

services_wide.name: Remodel & Installation
services_wide.description: Full bathroom and kitchen plumbing remodels, new fixtures, and system upgrades.

about_features.title: 24/7 Available
about_features.description: Emergency plumbing doesn't follow business hours. We're available whenever you need us.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: City of Chicago licensed plumbers with full liability and workers' compensation insurance.

about_features.title: Upfront Pricing
about_features.description: No surprises. You know the cost before we start work. Transparent estimates every time.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Burst pipe at 2am and they were here in 45 minutes. Professional, fast, and the price was exactly what they quoted.

reviews.name: Robert H.
reviews.text: Renovated our entire bathroom plumbing. Clean work, stayed on budget, and they cleaned up after themselves.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Called them for a clogged drain. They came same-day and had it fixed in 30 minutes. Will definitely call them again.
